fields.label: Business name
fields.hint: Appears in the footer next to the copyright.

fields.label: Tagline
fields.hint: Short line under your business name in the footer.

fields.label: Phone (display)
fields.hint: Shown next to phone icons throughout the site (formatted, e.g., (555) 123-4567).

fields.label: Phone (E.164)
fields.hint: Used for click-to-call links. Must start with +1 and digits only.

fields.label: Email
fields.hint: Used for contact links and the contact section.

fields.label: Address
fields.hint: Shown in the contact section and footer if set.

fields.label: Hours
fields.hint: Shown in the contact section (e.g., Mon-Fri 9-5).

fields.label: Service area
fields.hint: Shown on the contact page (e.g., Bay Area, California).

fields.label: Badge
fields.hint: Small pill above your main headline (e.g., 'Local plumbing experts').

fields.label: Headline (pre)
fields.hint: First part of the big headline at the top of your homepage.

fields.label: Headline accent
fields.hint: Highlighted/colored part of the homepage headline.

fields.label: Subheadline
fields.hint: Sentence under the headline that explains what you do.

fields.label: Subheadline (secondary)
fields.hint: Optional second sentence after the main subheadline.

fields.label: Primary CTA text
fields.hint: Label on the main button in the hero (e.g., 'Get a free quote').

fields.label: Primary CTA link
fields.hint: Where the main button goes (e.g., #contact, tel:+15555555555).

fields.label: Secondary CTA text
fields.hint: Label on the secondary button next to the main one.

fields.label: Secondary CTA link
fields.hint: Where the secondary button goes.

fields.label: Build — Name
fields.hint: Title of the build/setup pricing card.

fields.label: Build — Description
fields.hint: Short blurb under the build card title.

fields.label: Build — Footnote
fields.hint: Small text below the price (e.g., 'one-time, billed at start').

fields.label: Build — CTA text
fields.hint: Button label on the build card.

fields.label: Build — CTA link
fields.hint: Where the build card button goes.

fields.label: Care — Name
fields.hint: Title of the monthly care plan card.

fields.label: Care — Description
fields.hint: Short blurb under the care plan card title.

fields.label: Care — Footnote
fields.hint: Small text under the monthly price (e.g., 'cancel anytime').

fields.label: Care — CTA text
fields.hint: Button label on the care plan card.

fields.label: Care — CTA link
fields.hint: Where the care plan card button goes.

fields.label: Headline
fields.hint: Big call-to-action headline near the bottom of your homepage.

fields.label: Button text
fields.hint: Label on the final CTA button.

fields.label: Button link
fields.hint: Where the final CTA button goes.

fields.label: Footer tagline
fields.hint: Short line shown in the footer under your business name.

fields.label: Copyright year
fields.hint: Year shown in the footer copyright line.

fields.label: Instagram
fields.hint: Full URL to your Instagram profile. Leave blank to hide.

fields.label: Facebook
fields.hint: Full URL to your Facebook page. Leave blank to hide.

fields.label: Google Business
fields.hint: Full URL to your Google Business profile. Leave blank to hide.

fields.label: Hero image
fields.hint: The big photo at the top of your homepage.

fields.label: About image
fields.hint: Photo shown in the About section (e.g., team or owner photo).
